enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Oh Thendrale, the protagonists express their deep affection and yearning for each other, encapsulating the beauty of love. The song's soothing melody and heartfelt lyrics create an atmosphere of nostalgia and romance, making it a perfect fit for intimate moments. Set against the backdrop of Endrendrum Kadhal, it enhances the emotional depth of the film's narrative. The collaboration between Anuradha Sriram and SPB adds a unique charm, making it a cherished favorite among fans.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Oh Thendrale from Endrendrum Kadhal is a mesmerizing duet that captures the essence of love and longing. With the enchanting voices of Anuradha Sriram and the legendary SPB, this song weaves a magical tapestry of emotions. The soulful composition by Manoj Bhatnagar elevates the romantic vibe, making it a timeless classic.
stanzaMeanings: Oh gentle breeze, come and be the shadow of my work, come and speak with all the love of this land.
As I walk, the flowers bloom, and the garden speaks of the good things.
Oh gentle breeze, oh gentle breeze.
Will the first love and the first kiss ever be forgotten?
Will the first love and the first kiss ever be forgotten?
Will the memories that stay in the heart shine bright?
I am not in my heart, but you are in yours.
Even when the time changes, will my love change? Even when the time changes, will my love change? Embrace me.
Oh gentle breeze, oh gentle breeze.
In the time when the birds are seen, memories of Meenakshi come to mind.
In the moonlight, I am watching, the flower face dances in my thoughts.
I see the shadow of motherhood in you.
The thoughts that trouble my heart, the dreams that linger in my eyes, tell me about them.
Oh gentle breeze, come and be the shadow of my work, all the desires of love want to speak with you.
Oh gentle breeze, oh gentle breeze, oh gentle breeze, oh gentle breeze.
